name: comparison_mixed_signedness_with_real_arith
description: Code should include comparison between unsigned operand and result of integer parameter multiplied by real literal, where the multiplication result is treated as signed in the comparison cell
snippet: module test(input [31:0] a, output q); parameter VALUE = 100; assign q = a > VALUE * 1.2; endmodule

name: unsigned_signed_comparison_constant_expr
description: Code should include comparison between unsigned input [N:0] and signed constant expression derived from parameter arithmetic with real literal
snippet: assign q = a > VALUE * 1.2; // a is input [31:0], VALUE is integer parameter
